metadata.name: Distort-flecting Sensation (with my beat code)
metadata.author: Se7enSlasher
metadata.source: Se7enSlasher - Distort-flecting Sensation (with my beat code).milk

perFrameCode: timeupd = if(equal(time%0.015, 0), timeupd = timeupd + 0.015, timeupd); //increments the new value communicated via time variable.
beatreset = if(above(timeupd, 0.2) && above(normvol, 2), timeupd = 0, timeupd); //the new time value resets to 0 if the volume is higher than 2 and it passed 0.2 seconds.
